articles.title: GROK 3 IS SET TO BE RELEASED ON MONDAY
articles.summary: xAI's Grok 3, trained with 200 million GPU-hours, introduces enhanced reasoning, self-correction, and synthetic data training. It is set to be released on Monday.

articles.title: ANTHROPIC AND UK GOVERNMENT SIGN AI COLLABORATION MOU
articles.summary: Anthropic has partnered with the UK government to explore AI applications in public services, emphasizing responsible deployment, economic growth, and scientific research using its Claude model.

articles.title: OPENAI REVISES CHATGPT POLICIES TO PROMOTE INTELLECTUAL FREEDOM
articles.summary: OpenAI has updated its AI training policies to reduce content restrictions, emphasizing neutrality, truth-seeking, and offering multiple perspectives on controversial topics.

articles.title: CODEI/O: CONDENSING REASONING PATTERNS VIA CODE INPUT-OUTPUT PREDICTION
articles.summary: CodeI/O improves reasoning in large language models by converting code into an input-output prediction format. This enhances performance across various reasoning tasks by teaching universal reasoning principles without relying on code syntax. Further refinement through multi-turn revision boosts accuracy by verifying predictions.

articles.title: PRE-TRAINING WITH CONTINUOUS CONCEPTS
articles.summary: CoCoMix is a pretraining framework that enhances next-token prediction by integrating continuous concepts learned from a sparse autoencoder. It improves sample efficiency, outperforming standard methods in language modeling and reasoning tasks. Additionally, it enhances interpretability by allowing direct inspection and modification of predicted concepts.

articles.title: A MULTIPLE INSTANCE LEARNING FRAMEWORK
articles.summary: A new multiple instance learning framework for whole slide image classification introduces a dual-scale vision-language approach, using a prototype-guided patch decoder and a context-guided text decoder to enhance model performance on pathology tasks.

articles.title: THE BATTLE AGAINST BOTS: HOW TO PROTECT YOUR APP
articles.summary: Modern bots are smarter than ever [11]—executing JavaScript, storing cookies, rotating IPs, and even cracking CAPTCHAs with AI. As attacks grow more sophisticated, traditional detection just isn't enough.

articles.title: SELF CONTAINED FSDP IMPLEMENTATION (GITHUB FILE)
articles.summary: A single 500 line implementation of data parallel that gets 48MFU.

articles.title: 90% FASTER B200 TRAINING
articles.summary: Together AI shares their great work improving training kernels. They use TorchTitan as a testing ground and find huge improvements by targeting the architecture.

articles.title: A ZERO-SHOT GRAPH ANOMALY DETECTION MODEL
articles.summary: A new graph foundation model, AnomalyGFM, improves zero- and few-shot anomaly detection by learning graph-agnostic representations, enabling better generalization across diverse datasets.

articles.title: TRADING WITH LLMS
articles.summary: Researchers integrate reinforcement learning and large language models to enhance risk-sensitive trading strategies, extending CPPO with LLM-generated risk assessments and trading recommendations, tested on Nasdaq-100 financial data.

articles.title: GOOGLE AND IRELAND CELEBRATE INSIGHT AI SCHOLARSHIP
articles.summary: Google hosts Irish officials to celebrate the Insight AI Scholarship, supporting students from underrepresented backgrounds in advancing AI and digital skills.

articles.title: BOLT.NEW INTRODUCES AI APP GENERATION FOR IOS AND ANDROID (25 MINUTE VIDEO)
articles.summary: StackBlitz, better known for its AI tool Bolt.new, released an AI mobile app developer in partnership with Expo. Users can describe their app idea in natural language, and Bolt's AI will generate code for full-stack iOS and Android apps in real-time.

articles.title: DEEPSEEK TOOL PROMPTS (GITHUB PR)
articles.summary: DeepSeek doesn't use system prompts, but they do use search and other prompts.

articles.title: ANTHROPIC CALLS FOR URGENCY IN AI GOVERNANCE
articles.summary: At the Paris AI Action Summit, Anthropic emphasized the need for democratic nations to lead AI development, mitigate security risks, and manage economic disruptions caused by advanced AI models.

articles.title: OPENAI'S OPERATOR AGENT HELPED ME MOVE, BUT I HAD TO HELP IT, TOO
articles.summary: OpenAI's Operator is a promising AI agent that can automate online tasks but currently requires significant human assistance.
